pregame_model_read.closing_market_observed: 7+ moved from -117 entry to roughly -143 before first pitch
pregame_model_read.pre_bet_thesis: Best whiff sustainability and leash profile on the slate. Recent ceiling form plus Padres swing-and-miss profile supported a 7+ threshold despite the higher ladder line.

pitch_notes.changeup: 42 pitches, 5 K, 48% whiffs per swing, 33% CSW; primary kill pitch and biggest edge driver
pitch_notes.sinker: 42 pitches, 2 K, 38% CSW, 76% strike rate; command/runway stabilizer
pitch_notes.slider: 16 pitches, 2 K, 40% whiffs per swing, 31% CSW; secondary K support

what_worked: The deeper web/data review correctly elevated Sanchez as the cleanest structural K edge.
The 7+ ladder was justified by true whiff depth, not only price movement.
Positive CLV confirmed the market moved toward the model after entry.
Zero walks and 67% strike rate preserved the full seven-inning runway.
Three-pitch K support prevented single-pitch dependency.
what_to_keep: STRUCTURAL_K_EDGE classification for pitchers with leash + multiple K pitches + matchup whiff pockets.
SECONDARY_PITCH_SUPPORT requirement as a green-light factor.
CLV tracking from initial identification to entry to pre-first-pitch board.
model_evaluation.patch_recommendation: KEEP and upgrade Sanchez-style profile as premium K archetype: high CSW, 2+ strikeout pitches, low BB risk, stable 95+ pitch leash.

notes: This was the cleanest model win of the card. Sanchez cleared 7+ comfortably with 9 strikeouts, 35% CSW, 36% whiff rate on swings, zero walks, and full 7.0 IP leash. The postmortem confirms the model's main slate ranking was correct.
